description.value:
You acknowledge that you are connected to the Newborn, now and forever, and have embraced the nascent godling as family. You become trained in Religion. If you would automatically become trained in this skill (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in another skill of your choice. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Additional Lore] general feat for Newborn Lore.

In addition, the first time each day that you gain the dying condition, the Newborn—or perhaps some other unknown force—automatically stabilizes you. You lose the dying condition, though you remain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Unconscious] at 0 Hit Points.
